# NICE(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  nice — run a command with modified scheduling priority

## SYNOPSIS
  nice [-n priority] <command>

## DESCRIPTION
Runs a command with a modified nice value (priority). Lower nice = higher priority.
Range: -20 (highest) to 19 (lowest).

## EXAMPLES
  nice -n -5 nmap nexus.corp
  nice python3 exploit.py

## SEE ALSO
  renice, kill, top, ps
